name: Safety Goggles & Face Shield
shortDescription: Anti-fog eye protection and full-face shield for grinding and chemicals.
longDescription: Impact-rated polycarbonate eye and face protection with an anti-fog, anti-scratch coating. The wide-vision goggle seals against dust and splash, while the full-face shield adds protection for grinding, cutting and chemical decanting. Both are compatible with prescription eyewear and helmet mounting.

images.alt: Safety Goggles & Face Shield supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
